title: Calendar Slot Click Event
description: Represents the event payload when a calendar slot (date cell) is clicked by the user.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Payload for calendar date cell clicks.

props.name: component
props.description: The calendar component instance that triggered the slot click event.

props.name: item
props.description: The date value of the clicked calendar slot.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Indicates whether the click was triggered by user interaction.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native browser mouse event that triggered the slot click.
